phrases.intent_en: Ask where to purchase entry tickets
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde puedo comprar las entradas de acceso?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-deh PWEH-doh kohm-PRAHR lahs en-TRAH-dahs deh ahk-SEH-soh

likely_response.local: En la taquilla junto a la entrada principal.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN LAH tah-k-EEL-lah HOON-toh AH LAH ehnt-RAH-dah preen-thee-PAHL
likely_response.translation_en: At the ticket office, right next to it.

responses.english: At the ticket office, right next to it.
responses.phonetic: EHN LAH tah-k-EEL-lah HOON-toh AH LAH ehnt-RAH-dah preen-thee-PAHL
responses.local: En la taquilla junto a la entrada principal.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the guided tour starts
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde comienza la visita guiada hoy?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, DON-de ko-MYEN-sa la bee-SEE-ta gee-A-da oy?

likely_response.local: Junto a la taquilla, bajo el arco norte.
likely_response.pronunciation: HOON-toh AH LAH tah-k-EEL-lah BAH-hoh EHL AHR-koh NOHR-teh
likely_response.translation_en: In front of the main entrance of the monument.

responses.english: In front of the main entrance of the monument.
responses.phonetic: HOON-toh AH LAH tah-k-EEL-lah BAH-hoh EHL AHR-koh NOHR-teh
responses.local: Junto a la taquilla, bajo el arco norte.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if photography is allowed inside
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿se permite tomar fotos en el interior?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ¿seh pehr-MEE-teh toh-MAHR FOH-tohs ehn ehl een-teh-ree-OHR?

likely_response.local: Sí, sin flash en la sala principal y cripta.
likely_response.pronunciation: SÍ SEEN FLAHS EHN LAH SAH-lah preen-thee-PAHL Y KREEP-tah
likely_response.translation_en: Yes, without flash. Check the rules at the entrance.

responses.english: Yes, without flash. Check the rules at the entrance.
responses.phonetic: SÍ SEEN FLAHS EHN LAH SAH-lah preen-thee-PAHL Y KREEP-tah
responses.local: Sí, sin flash en la sala principal y cripta.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the taxi stand is
phrases.text_local: Disculpe, ¿dónde está la parada de taxis más cercana?
phrases.pronunciation: Dees-KOOL-pe, DON-deh es-TAH la pah-RAH-dah de TAH-ksees mahs ser-KAH-nah?

likely_response.local: Carretera abajo, a la derecha frente al monumento.
likely_response.pronunciation: kahr-reh-TEH-rah ah-BAH-hoh AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah FREHN-teh AHL moh-noo-MEHN-toh
likely_response.translation_en: Down the road, on the right opposite the monument.

responses.english: Down the road, on the right opposite the monument.
responses.phonetic: kahr-reh-TEH-rah ah-BAH-hoh AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah FREHN-teh AHL moh-noo-MEHN-toh
responses.local: Carretera abajo, a la derecha frente al monumento.
